text: I feel a subtle thrill in this environment—a space humming with the potential for discovery. The glass walls invite transparency and observation, suggesting an atmosphere that values both openness and curiosity. The R+D signage on the wall in the second image reminds me of the ongoing pursuit of progress, where research and development are celebrated. I am both participant and observer, aware of the structured yet creative energy, and feeling hopeful about the possibilities these intersections of minds and ideas may yield.
